experiences.title: Data Science Research Assistant
experiences.description: Driving large-scale AI/ML research focused on modeling online community behavior, toxicity dynamics, and lifecycle patterns using advanced Natural Language Processing and statistical learning. Designed end-to-end data pipelines to process and analyze 200GB+ of Reddit data, transforming unstructured social media content into structured insights. Leveraged transformer-based models and large-scale analytics to identify signals of community growth, engagement, moderation effectiveness, and decline. This work directly contributes to understanding digital ecosystems and building predictive frameworks for community sustainability.
responsibilities: Architected scalable data pipelines to process 200GB+ unstructured Reddit data using Python, enabling efficient ingestion, preprocessing, and transformation of large-scale text datasets
Applied transformer-based NLP models (Hugging Face, DeBERTa variants) and Detoxify to perform toxicity and hate speech classification across millions of records
Engineered high-value features including sentiment distributions, toxicity scores, temporal engagement metrics, and user activity patterns for downstream ML analysis
Performed statistical modeling and exploratory data analysis to uncover trends in community growth, attrition, and moderation impact
Developed automated workflows for data collection via APIs and batch processing using Linux-based high-performance computing environments
Resolved large-scale data challenges including schema inconsistencies, timestamp normalization, and memory-efficient processing of high-volume CSV files
Analyzed moderator behavior, AutoModerator contributions, and restricted/banned subreddit patterns to quantify community health indicators
Optimized data processing performance using chunking strategies, parallel execution, and background processing (nohup), improving pipeline efficiency
Collaborated with interdisciplinary research teams to translate machine learning outputs into interpretable insights for academic and applied research
Documented end-to-end pipelines, methodologies, and experimental results to ensure reproducibility and scalability of research workflows

experiences.title: Software Engineer (AI, Data & Systems)
experiences.description: Built data-driven systems and intelligent automation solutions for large-scale telecom analytics platforms, combining data engineering, machine learning concepts, and distributed system operations. Specialized in analyzing high-volume telecom data to detect anomalies, optimize network performance, and improve customer intelligence systems. Delivered measurable business impact by reducing network congestion by 23% and maintaining 98.8% production uptime across mission-critical systems. Integrated ML-driven approaches into CRM workflows to enhance targeting and engagement across 100K+ users.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented anomaly detection solutions using Python, SQL, and statistical techniques to identify irregular telecom traffic patterns, reducing network congestion by 23%
Processed and analyzed large-scale telecom datasets (millions of events/day), extracting insights on user behavior, roaming patterns, and network performance
Developed robust data pipelines and automation scripts using Python and Bash to streamline ETL workflows, monitoring, and system operations
Engineered feature extraction logic from telecom event streams to support analytics and machine learning-driven decision systems
Integrated ML-based targeting logic into CRM platforms, improving campaign effectiveness across 100K+ users in EMEA regions
Led production server migrations and deployments across Linux and Solaris environments, ensuring 98.8% uptime and high system reliability
Handled L2/L3 production incidents, performing deep root cause analysis and system debugging in distributed environments
Implemented logging, monitoring, and data validation frameworks to ensure data integrity and pipeline stability
Collaborated with cross-functional teams including data engineers, analysts, and stakeholders to deliver scalable data solutions
Automated repetitive operational processes, significantly reducing manual effort and improving system efficiency
Contributed to system design improvements focusing on scalability, fault tolerance, and performance optimization
Maintained detailed technical documentation for workflows, scripts, and deployment processes to support long-term maintainability
